forecast.name: This Afternoon
forecast.detailedForecast: Showers and thunderstorms. Some of the storms could be severe. Mostly sunny. High near 88, with temperatures falling to around 84 in the afternoon. West southwest wind around 17 mph, with gusts as high as 35 mph. Chance of precipitation is 80%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.

forecast.name: Tonight
forecast.detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms before 7pm, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms between 7pm and 8pm, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms between 8pm and 3am. Some of the storms could be severe. Mostly cloudy. Low around 51, with temperatures rising to around 54 overnight. West northwest wind 8 to 14 mph, with gusts as high as 28 mph. Chance of precipitation is 60%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.

forecast.name: Wednesday
forecast.detailedForecast: Partly sunny. High near 63, with temperatures falling to around 61 in the afternoon. North wind around 9 mph. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

nubsNob.comments: Thank-you for a fantastic winter at Nub's Nob! This was a true Northern Michigan winter with 188" of snow and sustained cold. This summer our Crew will be busy replacing our beloved Orange lift with a new fixed grip quad lift from SkyTrac. This lift is built in the USA and will be nearly identical to the new Green lift that was installed in 2023. Thanks for skiing and riding at Nub's Nob.
